$comment: JSON Schema for src/data/patterns.json. gotchas minItems=3 is enforced at this level because all 54 existing entries already have ≥3 gotchas (verified 2026-05-10). Community PRs must provide at least 3 gotchas per ADR-0009 rule 5.

pattern_id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for the pattern (e.g. 'computed-field-cross-model').

intent_keywords.description: Keywords used for semantic search / intent matching.

file_ref.description: Source file reference in the form 'path/to/file.py:lineno' (e.g. 'addons/sale/models/sale_order.py:120').

gotchas.description: At least 3 common mistakes or caveats for this pattern (ADR-0009 rule 5).

odoo_version_min.description: Minimum Odoo version for this pattern (e.g. '16.0', '17.0', '18.0').

core_symbol_names.description: Optional list of Odoo core symbol FQNs referenced by this pattern (e.g. ['odoo.api.depends']).

odoo_version_max.description: Optional maximum Odoo version for this pattern (e.g. '17.0').
